title: lithocarpus pseudoreinwardtii
intro: Lithocarpus pseudoreinwardtii, also known as the Java beech or copper beech, is a species of tree native to Indonesia, particularly in Java. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lithocarpus pseudoreinwardtii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. Lithocarpus pseudoreinwardtii is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water for its herbal remedies, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine.
